creator: peter_dunning@dsl.pipex.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	etracer
#	etracer/Makefile
#	etracer/pkg-descr
#	etracer/pkg-plist
#	etracer/distinfo
#
echo c - etracer
mkdir -p etracer > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - etracer/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >etracer/Makefile << 'END-of-etracer/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   extreme tux racer
X# Date created:        22 February 2008
X# Whom:                Peter Dunning
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=		etracer
XPORTVERSION=		0.4
XCATEGORIES=		games
XMASTER_SITES=		${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	extremetuxracer/
XDISTNAME=		extremetuxracer-${DISTVERSIONPREFIX}${DISTVERSION}${DISTVERSIONSUFFIX}
X
XMAINTAINER=		peter_dunning@dsl.pipex.com
XCOMMENT=		The latest and greatest fork of the classic Tux Racer
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=		tcl85:${PORTSDIR}/lang/tcl85
X
XUSE_SDL=		mixer sdl
XUSE_GL=			yes
XUSE_GMAKE=		yes
XGNU_CONFIGURE=		yes
XCONFIGURE_TARGET=	--build=${MACHINE_ARCH}-portbld-freebsd${OSREL}
XCONFIGURE_ARGS=		--prefix=${PREFIX} ${CONFIGURE_TARGET} --with-tcl=${PREFIX}/lib/tcl8.5 --with-tcl-inc=${PREFIX}/include/tcl8.5
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-etracer/Makefile
echo x - etracer/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >etracer/pkg-descr << 'END-of-etracer/pkg-descr'
XThis is a port for Extreme Tux Racer, the latest fork of the classic Tux Racer,
Xwhich involves racing downhill as tux.
XExtreme Tux Racer contains many new courses, cups and other features.
X
XWWW: http://extremetuxracer.com/
END-of-etracer/pkg-descr
echo x - etracer/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >etracer/pkg-plist << 'END-of-etracer/pkg-plist'
